---
title: "Lab2_Roulette_Simulation"
author: "Aayan Abdullah"
date: "2025-05-16"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
set.seed(123)
```
```{r}
# American roulette simulation
p_win_american <- 18/38
n_spins1       <- 200

wallet <- numeric(n_spins1 + 1)
wallet[1] <- 200

for (i in seq_len(n_spins1)) {
  win <- runif(1) < p_win_american
  wallet[i + 1] <- wallet[i] + ifelse(win,  1, -1)
}

plot(
  wallet,
  type = "l",
  xlab = "Spin Number",
  ylab = "Wallet Balance ($)",
  main = "200 Spin Wallet Path"
)
grid()

```

```{r}
# Analytical for European roulette
p_win_eu <- 18/37
ev       <- p_win_eu * 1 + (1 - p_win_eu) * (-1)
var_eu   <- 1 - ev^2

cat(sprintf("Analytical EV:  %.6f\n", ev))
cat(sprintf("Analytical Var: %.6f\n\n", var_eu))

# Simulation
n_spins2  <- 10000
outcomes  <- ifelse(runif(n_spins2) < p_win_eu, 1, -1)
sim_ev    <- mean(outcomes)
sim_var   <- var(outcomes)

cat(sprintf("Simulated EV:  %.6f\n", sim_ev))
cat(sprintf("Simulated Var: %.6f\n", sim_var))

```
